description: White House poster headlined 'TAX DAY'. The background is a full-color photograph of Donald Trump striding forward with a raised clenched fist, smiling, wearing a navy suit, red tie, and a red 'USA' cap with a small American flag; behind him a blurred crowd and a large blue jumbotron screen reads 'DONALD J. TRUMP'. A bold red banner at the top holds large white serif text 'TAX DAY'. Near the bottom, three white check-mark lines read: 'Largest Tax Refund Season', 'Refunds up 11%', and 'Millions Receiving More'. The White House wordmark and a small Executive Mansion icon are centered at the very bottom.
notable_text: TAX DAY; Largest Tax Refund Season; Refunds up 11%; Millions Receiving More; THE WHITE HOUSE
